input:
{"commands": ["python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, os, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
path='[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]'
print('exists', os.path.exists(path), 'size', os.path.getsize(path))
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    names=z.namelist()
    print('parts', [n for n in names if n.startswith('xl/worksheets/')])
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
    print('sheets', [s.attrib['name'] for s in wb.find('a:sheets', ns)])
PY"]}
label: positive

raw_step.causal_note: Successful regeneration required a compact QA pass.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, os, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
path='[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]'
print('exists', os.path.exists(path), 'size', os.path.getsize(path))
with zipfile.ZipFile(path) as z:
    names=z.namelist()
    print('parts', [n for n in names if n.startswith('xl/worksheets/')])
    wb=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
    print('sheets', [s.attrib['name'] for s in wb.find('a:sheets', ns)])
PY
